name: tailortex
description: A local-first, accessible visual workspace for writing real LaTeX documents

scripts.test:syntax: node --check server.js && node --check mcp-server.js && node --check agent-worker.js && for f in public/js/*.js cloud/compile-service/index.js cloud/scripts/set-admin.js; do node --check "$f" || exit 1; done
scripts.test:rules: firebase emulators:exec --only firestore,storage --project demo-wordtex "node --test test/rules.test.mjs test/storage.rules.test.mjs"
